summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of TrendScout public crawlability and prerendered content. All 14 test categories passed. Custom static server (serve.js) correctly serves prerendered HTML with unique titles, meta descriptions, canonicals, OG tags, schema, H1s, body copy, CTAs, and internal links for 39 routes. React app hydrates correctly after prerender content is hidden.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features verified working. Prerender content works correctly with custom static server (serve.js). 39 routes have unique prerendered HTML. React app hydrates correctly. HTML lang='en-GB' confirmed.
